validation_summary.evidence: python -m py_compile exits 0 (~0.1s); python -m unittest skills.development-harness.scripts.tests.test_parallel_execution_reference -v passes 10/10 (0.003s); python -m unittest discover skills/development-harness/scripts/tests passes 274/275 with 1 OS-specific skip (37.6s, up from 265 -- 10 new cases for unit_047)

checkpoint.summary: unit_047 complete. New skills/development-harness/references/parallel-execution.md (~240 lines) consolidates the operator-facing deep-dive that architecture.md (unit_045) and phase-contract.md (unit_046) point forward to. Seven top-level numbered sections: Dispatch lifecycle (ASCII flow + idle->dispatched->merging->idle invariants), Overlap-matrix algorithm (greedy-packer pseudocode + 4 gates + verbatim-exclusion-reason table), Merge-order rationale (determinism-beats-throughput + --no-ff + first-parent log attribution), Failure-mode catalog (5 categories x source + conflict_strategy effect + kill-switch counting in one table), Recovery procedures (mid-dispatch crash, mid-merge crash, kill-switch tripped, scope-violation dispute -- numbered steps each + 'never force-delete the lock' warning), Readiness checklist (8 markdown checkboxes gating 'should you enable parallelism'), Observability quick reference (all 4 .harness/logs/<batch_id>/ artifacts + exact Batch Timings format string). Bundled doc/code consistency fix: earlier unit_045 + unit_046 used 'touches_overlap' as the overlap exclusion reason but compute_parallel_batch.py L170 actually emits 'path_overlap_with:<id>'. Grep while writing parallel-execution.md caught it. Fixed architecture.md L133 + phase-contract.md L138+L161 + the two corresponding regression tests. parallel-execution.md uses path_overlap_with throughout and includes an explicit negative assertion that 'touches_overlap' does NOT appear anywhere. New test_parallel_execution_reference.py (180 LOC, 10 cases across 3 classes) pins every numbered section's substantive anchors AND the cross-link to architecture.md survives AND the exclusion-reason-string consistency regression guard. Suite 265 -> 275.
checkpoint.next_action: Complete unit_048 (PHASE_011): update skills/development-harness/commands/create.md Phase 2 with two structured bootstrap questions -- (1) 'Enable parallel unit execution? (y/n, default n)' writing to config.execution_mode.parallelism.enabled; (2) 'Break-on-schema-bump vs migrate? (break/migrate, default break)' writing to config.execution_mode.versioning.break_on_schema_bump. Also update Phase 4 (phase-graph compilation) to instruct proposing touches_paths per unit and setting parallel_safe: false when blast radius is unknown. This is the last documentation unit before PHASE_011 closes. Validation: grep Phase 2 + Phase 4 sections for the new question text / instruction text; structural presence test.
